name: Mini Corndogs
recipeInstructions:
Mini Corndogs
1. Combine flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. With a pastry blender, cut vegetable shortening into the flour mixture until there are fine crumbs.
3. Add egg and milk to the flour mixture and blend well.
4. Pour vegetable oil to a depth of 2 inches in a deep fryer or large saucepan. Heat oil to 375 degrees.
5. Pat frankfurters dry with paper towels. Insert a toothpick into the center of each frankfurter.
6. Dip each frankfurter into the batter and then into the hot oil until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels.
